name: Accidental Discharge
author: Kinky Joe & Josian
bootlegger: Misfire (Loric): A drunk or poisoned player might misfire mechanically (i.e. function adversely to the ability).
The ability granted to the Demon from the Boffin might Misfire.
If the Vigormortis attacks itself & a Scarlet Woman becomes the new Vigormortis, one of the original Vigormortis Townsfolk neighbors is poisoned.
If a Vigormortis ability is active, any minions killed by a Vigormortis have their abilities.
